marketplace.title: Skills Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Skills, CLI tools and automations to extend Claude Code, Cherry Studio and your team's workflow.
marketplace.itemCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 items} one {# item} other {# items}}
marketplace.emptyTitle: No skills match the current filter.
marketplace.thirdPartyWarningBody: Third-party skills are aggregated from external feeds. CherryIN does not vet them. Read the source link and consider running in a sandbox first.

list.title: Skill Reviews
list.subtitle: Review user-submitted Skills / CLIs and manage their listing status.
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by skill name, author, or category
list.emptyDescription: Submissions made by users at /skills_marketplace will appear here.
list.messageChangesRequested: Please add a detailed description and examples.

listings.title: Marketplace resources
listings.subtitle: Manage how curated Skills appear on the user-facing /skills_marketplace — published items are visible to users, while unpublished ones stay in the admin console. Unpublished resources can be deleted directly (deletion is irreversible, so proceed with caution). Third-party resources are not managed here and are shown on the front end as "from the community, review at your own discretion".
listings.emptyHint: Adjust the filters, or approve more user submissions in the review list.
listings.deleteConfirmSuffix: ? This skill will be removed from marketplace resource management and can no longer be shown on the user side.

detail.requestChangesMessage: Please address the comments and resubmit.
detail.notePlaceholder: Your note will be appended to the review log.

aiReview.pageDescription: Configure the AI model, prompt, and decision rules for auto-approval. Once a submission enters review, the AI first evaluates it against the rules on this page; if its confidence meets the threshold it acts automatically, otherwise it escalates to a human reviewer.
aiReview.enableDescription: When off, all new submissions go through manual review (30-second simulated flow).
aiReview.promptDescription: The system prompt sent to the model. Includes evaluation dimensions and output format constraints.
aiReview.rulesDescription: Hard rules run before the AI judges. A match immediately produces a result or escalates to a human.
aiReview.blockedKeywordsLabel: Blocked Keywords (any match is rejected outright)
aiReview.blockedKeywordsHelp: Comma-separated; matched case-insensitively against name / description / tags.
aiReview.escalateDomainsLabel: Categories Always Escalated to Manual Review

edit.title: Edit skill
edit.descSuffix: . Changes are saved to localStorage and immediately affect the user-facing /skills_marketplace.

detail.copyInstallHint: Click to copy the install command to your clipboard, then paste and run it in your terminal / Claude Code / Cursor:
detail.agentPromptHint: Or copy the prompt below and hand it straight to an AI agent to install and follow the instructions automatically:
detail.thirdPartySuffix: does not endorse it — please vet the install command and permissions yourself.
